reference: THAT HIS SOUL MIGHT AFTERWARDS OCCUPY SUCH A STATION AS WOULD BE MOST SUITABLE TO HIS CHARACTER IT WAS SENTENCED TO INHABIT THE BODY OF THAT FINICAL GRINNING AND MISCHIEVOUS LITTLE MIMICK WITH FOUR LEGS WHICH YOU NOW BEHOLD BEFORE YOU
text: That his soul might afterwards occupy such a station as would be most suitable to his character. It was intended to inhabit the body of that finical, grinning, and mischievous little mimic with four legs, which you now behold before you.
